name: Herbed Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-cup measure, micro-cook onion and butter or margarine, uncovered, on 100% power for 1 to 1.5 minutes or until the onion is tender but not brown.
2. Stir in tomato sauce, dried basil, dried thyme, and freshly ground pepper.
3. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 50% power for 4 to 6 minutes or just till boiling.
4. Stir in the water and instant chicken bouillon granules.
5. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes or till the mixture is heated through.
6. Serve with Parmesan Croutons.
